impact: This gives the supervisor deterministic recovery rules before the next worker attempt: detect SyntaxError/py_compile/TS parser streaks early, force smaller proposals, require syntax-valid replacements, and steer the active solar extractor task toward a one-file no-dataclass implementation instead of another broad retry.
summary: Strengthen PP&D supervisor repair guidance for repeated syntax and compile rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
